artifact_role: Research record (rehearsal derived-claim set; evidence lane, product_learning-capped; not validation, not readiness, not buyer proof)

extraction_pass.note: Single hand-run pass by the authoring model in-session; per-claim timestamps are the pass timestamp.

corpus.creator: jeremyfragrance (Instagram)
corpus.corpus_input_hash_rule: sha256 over UTF-8 join('\n') of ordered 'shortcode:transcript_sha256:comments_sha256' rows below

claims.value: 12/12 corpus reels are fragrance-framed (caption and/or speech); at least 5/12 are persona/dance-led with fragrance as the frame rather than review content
receipt: every corpus caption contains 'Fragrance' or '#fragrance' (grid captions, 12/12)
DaH3L1Isdrc @ 8140: 'I'll show you ten fragrance brands and their ten best fragrances'
DaKd8E9skt8 @ 16000: 'And this is my fragrance of the day.'
persona-led examples: DaIr5aRsp8p (1 spoken cue, 'Oh, it's good.', 156K plays dance reel); DaK3uKxBlKy, DaKeXcVM0sx, DaKkwCiB_2B (no_speech)
claims.limitations: single week, recent-window stratum only; caption hashtags alone would over-count — speech/content check is what caps the review-content share

claims.value: Self-brand (Fragrance One) dominates the recent window: 9/12 reel captions carry self-brand commerce (7 'OFFICE Fragrance' + 2 'final70' discount-code captions) and the only multi-product content (DaH3L1Isdrc top-10) includes the self-brand slot. Distinct third-party products resolved: 8 (6 designer tier: Dior Sauvage, Chanel Allure Homme Sport, Carolina Herrera Good Girl, Lancome La Vie Est Belle, JPG Ultra Male, LV Imagination; 2 niche/luxury tier: Creed Aventus Absolu, Parfums de Marly Sedley); 2 further niche candidates unresolved (abstained). Note-family distribution: withheld (see limitations).
receipt: captions reels 1,4,5,6,9,10,12: 'OFFICE Fragrance' variants; reels 7,8: 'final70 70% FRAGRANCE Discount At www.FRAGRANCE.one'
DaH3L1Isdrc @ 30020: 'My fragrance brand fragrance one'
DaH3L1Isdrc @ 14940-52800: third-party product run (Dior Savage ... Lancome la vie et belle)
DaLBRQiMJhQ @ 3000: 'Jean Procté, ultra-male.'
claims.limitations: price tiers are operator_assigned market knowledge (see ontology slice); note-family distribution is unpopulatable from this corpus (2 note terms total) and is withheld, not zero; product mentions concentrate in 2 of 12 reels

claims.value: Page-1 comment texture is persona-driven, bilingual (DE/EN), and majority-critical: of 64 non-empty page-1 comments, ~34 (53%) are critical/mocking of the creator's current persona, ~17 (27%) supportive/fan, ~13 (20%) neutral/ambiguous. Collector discourse, dupe-seeking language, and purchase-intent language are ABSENT (0 instances). One brand-voiced comment (Moodsprays) thanks the creator.
claims.confidence_or_abstention: medium (n=64 non-empty of 85 captured; single coding pass by the extraction model; aggregate only)
receipt: supportive: comment 18179239690407249 'Prime Jeremy 👏👏👏'; 17853935082695188 'Nice. A regular video! 👏🏽'; 17920021233391073 '...the #1 fragrance Influencer in the world 🌹💐'

critical/mocking: 18052470497785580 'Scruffy narcissist trying to sell his cheap €5 fragrances'; 18089104538292731 'You became the most pathetic person in online'; 18110658445941753 'Echt schade zu sehen, wie die Qualität nachlässt...'; 18115268735498182 'This was a difficult watch...'
brand-voiced: 18114708548490508 'vielen Dank❤️❤️❤️wir freuen uns so, dass Dir unsere Moodsprays gefallen 🙌❤️'
purchase-intent probes ('bought it because of you', 'where do I get', dupe requests): zero matches across all 85 captured comments
claims.limitations: page-1 skew is severe (DaIr5aRsp8p: 15 of 215 comments visible); 21/85 captured comments have empty text (unrendered stickers/emoji); sentiment coding is model judgment, not a validated classifier; per-commenter claims deliberately not made

receipt: third-party brand content exists in only 2/12 reels (DaH3L1Isdrc, DaLBRQiMJhQ); no comparable-brand content series exists in the corpus to compare against the creator's own baseline
claims.limitations: requires a longer window and per-video performance history (charter Section 4 panel 1: 'how the creator's videos on comparable brands performed against their own baseline')

receipt: corpus spans one capture cycle (2026-06-29); a trajectory needs at least two
claims.limitations: blocked on the time axis, not on extraction

claims.value: Commercial density is very high but self-directed: 11/12 reels carry a commercial marker (9 self-brand captions incl. 2 discount codes; 5-reel hosted-trip gifted-invite candidate cluster; overlap 4), 1/12 organic, 0/12 platform-labeled paid partnership. Sponsor concentration: a single candidate gifting relationship (Nike Schroeder / Forte Village Sardinia). Disclosure hygiene: the hosted-trip cluster carries no #ad/#sponsored/platform label; disclosure is informal ('Thanks To ... Invite' in captions).

source_refs.records: all 12 corpus rows + grid metadata packet 01KWA193403TYNTBJVWAP5W5NE

receipt: per-reel classifications: the 12 ad.detection claims above
grid: is_paid_partnership false/null on all 12; sponsor_users=[] and ad_term_candidates=[] on all 12
claims.limitations: one week of reels; gifted-candidate labels are inferred, not platform-verified; 'load' here cannot be compared to the creator's norm without history

claims.value: Directional only: the 5 hosted-trip (gifted-candidate) reels underperform the other 7 on median plays (3,153 vs 4,981) and median likes (110 vs 141). The non-cluster median is pulled by persona/dance content (max 156,255 plays); the comparison is confounded and NOT decision-grade.
claims.confidence_or_abstention: low (n=5 vs 7, same-week posting, persona-content confound, plays observed at one snapshot)

source_refs.records: grid metadata packet 01KWA193403TYNTBJVWAP5W5NE for all 12 shortcodes

The real comparison is blocked on capture stratum (d): sponsored videos + matched organic pairs.

non_claims: not validation, not readiness, not buyer proof, not willingness-to-pay evidence
product_learning-capped; not evidence-grade for any sold report (materiality reacquisition + FLAG 1 remain open)
no person-level or demographic inference; audience texture is aggregate only
observed grid metrics quoted in receipts are observed values, not derived claims
